description_long: This is a modern HP laptop with a sleek, dark chassis and a minimalist design. The device features a large, high-resolution display with thin bezels, and the screen is open, revealing a full-sized keyboard with a standard QWERTY layout and a spacious touchpad. The exterior lid is adorned with a prominent HP logo in the center, while the sides of the laptop show multiple connectivity ports, including USB, HDMI, and possibly an audio jack. The laptop's build appears to be primarily metal or high-quality plastic, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight feel. The screen displays a colorful, abstract background, indicating that the device is powered on. The overall design is professional and suitable for both work and casual use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, dark HP laptop with a thin-bezel display, visible HP logo, and multiple side ports. The screen is open and powered on, showing a colorful abstract background.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a colorful display, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the thin profile, visible keyboard, and several ports including HDMI and USB.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed-back lid with a centered HP logo and no visible ports or screen.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the keyboard, screen, and additional ports, including a blue-colored USB port.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver HP logo is visible, centered on the back of the laptop lid. The logo consists of stylized lowercase 'hp' letters in a circular design.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying a colorful abstract background.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad visible.
